title: LlamaIndex Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for engineers using LlamaIndex for AI-driven indexing and search.

commands.description: Sets the index type to vector for semantic search capabilities.
commands.scenario: When you need to perform semantic search over large text corpora.

commands.description: Optimizes the index for low latency queries.
commands.scenario: When building a real-time search application requiring fast response times.

commands.description: Configures the API to use the Llama-2 model with moderate creativity.
commands.scenario: When generating creative content that still needs to be somewhat deterministic.

commands.description: Enables streaming responses for real-time data processing.
commands.scenario: When integrating LlamaIndex with a live data feed or dashboard.

commands.description: Sets the context window size for processing larger inputs.
commands.scenario: When dealing with large documents or datasets that exceed default limits.

commands.description: Sets a cost limit to manage API usage expenses.
commands.scenario: When operating under a strict budget for API calls.

commands.description: Enables GPU acceleration for faster processing.
commands.scenario: When processing large datasets that require high computational power.

commands.description: Configures the batch size for processing multiple queries simultaneously.
commands.scenario: When optimizing throughput for bulk query processing.

commands.description: Prompt technique for generating summaries of input text.
commands.scenario: When needing concise summaries of lengthy documents.

commands.description: Sets the number of retry attempts for failed API calls.
commands.scenario: When ensuring reliability in network-sensitive applications.

commands.command: "Explain the concept of AI in simple terms."
commands.description: Prompt technique for simplifying complex topics.
commands.scenario: When creating educational content for a non-technical audience.

commands.description: Sets the logging level to debug for detailed output.
commands.scenario: When troubleshooting issues during development or deployment.

commands.description: Enables caching to improve performance for repeated queries.
commands.scenario: When optimizing for speed in applications with repetitive queries.

commands.command: "Think step by step. Then verify your answer."
commands.description: Prompt technique for enhancing reasoning and accuracy.
commands.scenario: When building a code review bot that needs deterministic output.

commands.description: Recursively loads files from a directory structure for automated data ingestion.
Configures the query engine to maintain conversational context by injecting previous turns into the prompt.
Defines custom chunking strategies during index creation to optimize retrieval granularity.
Centralizes LLM, embedding, and parsing configurations into a single object for consistent pipeline execution.
Hybrid approach: combining direct query engine execution with manual retriever inspection for debugging retrieval quality.
